_comment: FIFA World Cup 2022 (Qatar) structure, in the schema simulate_tournament / run_prediction consume. 32 teams, 8 groups of 4; top 2 advance; best_thirds = 0; knockout R16 -> QF -> SF -> 3rd place + Final. This is the 2022 format, NOT 2026. Team values are the canonical slug team_ids from data/teams.json (e.g. qatar, united_states, south_korea). simulate_tournament seeds the first knockout round from 'knockout_bracket' (the official 2022 crossing) when present.

best_thirds_rule.note: 2022 format has no best third-placed qualifiers (that is the 2026 format).

tiebreak_rules._comment: Official FIFA 2022 group ranking order. The current simulator approximates this with points -> goal_difference -> goals_scored, then a seeded-deterministic order for remaining ties; head-to-head and fair-play are recorded here but not yet applied in code.

knockout_bracket._comment: Standard FIFA 2022 layout. R16 pairings ordered so adjacent winners form the quarter-finals. Upper half: R16-1..R16-4 -> QF-1/QF-2 -> SF-1; lower half: R16-5..R16-8 -> QF-3/QF-4 -> SF-2.
